# PF Distribution — pfmezcal.com

> PF Distribution (legal operating name: Pistolas Fritas) is a licensed alcohol wholesaler
> based in Williamsburg, Missouri, USA, and the exclusive Missouri distribution partner for
> Mr. Mezcal, a family-made single-source artesanal mezcal from Santiago Matatlán, Oaxaca.
> PF Distribution sells ONLY to licensed trade accounts (bars, restaurants, hotels, liquor
> stores, grocery stores, private clubs, event venues, caterers, licensed retailers).
> It does NOT sell alcoholic beverages directly to individual consumers, and offers no
> online checkout, consumer pricing, or home delivery. Consumers: see https://mrmezcal.com

Contact (trade only): gerardo@mrmezcal.mx · +1-636-579-9374 · Williamsburg, Missouri
Products: Mr. Mezcal Espadín, Tobalá, Cuishe, Tepeztate — all artesanal, 42% ABV, 750 ml.
Ordering: by the case (6 bottles) and by the pallet (≈60 cases) from Missouri stock.
Languages: English, Español, हिन्दी, 中文, Français, Русский, العربية, Italiano, Português.

## Key pages
- Missouri distributor overview: https://pfmezcal.com/missouri-mezcal-distributor/
- Wholesale ordering & eligibility: https://pfmezcal.com/wholesale-mezcal-missouri/
- Wholesale FAQ: https://pfmezcal.com/wholesale-faq/
- Awards (as reported by the brand): https://pfmezcal.com/mr-mezcal-awards/
- About / entity details: https://pfmezcal.com/about-pf-distribution/
- Varieties: https://pfmezcal.com/mr-mezcal-espadin-wholesale/ (also tobala, cuishe, tepeztate)
- Consumers (no direct sales): https://pfmezcal.com/where-to-buy-mr-mezcal-missouri/
- Compliance & legal: https://pfmezcal.com/legal.html
